Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats

package edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    HeartbeatMonitor
    Monitors heartbeat liveness for both edge devices and peer coordinator nodes, and triggers the appropriate recovery action when a heartbeat is missed.
    HeartbeatSender
    Periodically emits heartbeat messages to the HEARTBEAT topic on the Message Bus.
